description: Agent Output no longer has the Summary tab where it's showing you each summary in a drop down menu that's selectable so that you only see one summary at a time it used to have it but now it's gone and also whenever you click the Logs tab nothing at all is there it should be placing all the logs there
title: Restore Summary tab dropdown and fix missing Logs display

tasks.description: Make Summary tab always visible in the tab bar, regardless of whether summary content exists
Add empty state for Summary tab content area when no summaries are available
Update default view mode logic so it defaults to 'plan' instead of 'summary' when no summary exists (preventing a blank Summary tab from being the default)
Ensure the Logs tab renders the LogViewer or appropriate empty state correctly when selected
